component.name: BrainSprint
component.summary: A minimal writing sprint application for focused thinking and flow.

description.p: BrainSprint is a privacy-respecting, local-first writing sprint desktop app. Practice timed writing sessions with three game modes:

ul.li: Survival — Keep typing or lose progress
Creative — Write with a prompt and difficulty settings
Practice — Free writing with optional timer

description.p: All data stays on your machine — no accounts, no telemetry, no cloud.
